templateVersions.content: A candidate has applied to a job by sending their details via email. The details are stored in the Email body field seen here: {!$Input:Incoming_Email} Firstly Organize the information in the following format: Name: Email: Phone: Timing: Role/s applying for: Years of Experience: Current Role: Region applying for: Identification Type: Ethnicity: CV: How did you first learn about us?: Hidden Field: Consent: Please extract the information from the email provided into the provided formatting above.

A candidate has applied to a job by sending their details via email. The details are stored in the Email body field seen here: {!$Input:Incoming_Email} Firstly Organize the information in the following format: Name: Email: Phone: Timing: Role/s applying for: Years of Experience: Current Role: Region applying for: Identification Type: Ethnicity: ID Number: CV: How did you first learn about us?: Hidden Field: Consent: Please extract the information from the email provided into the provided formatting above.
